name: who
description: List all agents on your channel.

name: signal_done
description: Hand off to another agent. Use "@all" to broadcast to all agents on the channel.

next.description: Agent name to hand off to, or "@all" to broadcast

request.description: What you need the next agent to do

reply_to.description: Message ID being replied to (from a prior request). Resolves the pending request.

name: send_message
description: Send a message to another agent without handing off. Use "@all" to broadcast.

to.description: Agent name to message, or "@all" to broadcast

kind.description: Message type: 'request' expects a response, 'response' answers a prior request, 'fyi' is informational (default: fyi)

reply_to.description: Message ID being replied to (from a prior request/handoff). Resolves the pending request.

name: unregister
description: Unregister from the bus. You will no longer appear in `who` or receive messages. Use before re-registering with a different name.

name: register
description: Re-register on the bus. Auto-detects agent type and picks a unique name, or use `name` to choose your own. Useful after unregister or to change your name.

name.description: Custom name to register as (optional — auto-generated if omitted)
